# BP-158 positive: a gRPC-shaped method returns a raw error
lang: go
file: BP-158-vulnerable.go
variant: grpc
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"google.golang.org/grpc"
	"google.golang.org/grpc/status"
)

type Request struct{}
type Response struct{}
type server struct {
	grpc.Server
}

func (s *server) Get(ctx context.Context, req *Request) (*Response, error) {
	resp, err := loadResponse(req)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	return resp, nil
}

func loadResponse(*Request) (*Response, error) { return nil, nil }

func naked(err error) error {
	_ = status.Code(err)
	return err
}
